title: fragaria vesca f. sylvestris
intro: Fragaria vesca f. sylvestris, also known as the woodland strawberry or wild strawberry, is a subspecies of the strawberry plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca f. sylvestris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Fragaria vesca f. sylvestris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
